message:
Add vector column support and cosine similarity search

WASM (src/wasm.zig):
- Add readF32LE helper for float32 reading
- Add getVectorInfo() to get vector dimension and row count
- Add readVectorAt() to read single vector at index
- Add allocFloat32Buffer() for vector memory allocation
- Add cosineSimilarity() for computing similarity between vectors
- Add vectorSearchTopK() for brute-force top-k vector search

JavaScript (lanceql.js):
- LanceFile: Add getVectorInfo(), readVectorAt(), cosineSimilarity(), vectorSearch()
- RemoteLanceFile: Add async versions with batched Range requests
  - getVectorInfo() - get vector metadata
  - readVectorAt() - read single vector
  - readVectorsAtIndices() - batch read multiple vectors
  - cosineSimilarity() - JS implementation
  - vectorSearch() - brute-force search with progress callback

This enables semantic search for Lance files with embedding columns.
